basic_details.job_title: TISS Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS), Guwahati Campus
basic_details.short_information: TISS is recruiting 2 Assistant Professors on a contractual basis.

qualification.details: Educational Qualification (Common for both posts): A. Master’s Degree with 55% marks in relevant subject + NET/SLET/SET OR Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations. OR B. Ph.D. from top 500 ranked foreign university. | Desirable Qualifications: | Ph.D. in relevant field + teaching experience Research on Northeast India Good publication record Ability to teach interdisciplinary courses

vacancy_details.details: 1. Centre for Undergraduate Studies (1 Post) – Specialization in Psychology 2. Centre for Peace and Conflict Studies, School of Social Sciences and Humanities (1 Post) – Specialization in Sociology / Political Science / Economics / History

selection_process: Shortlisting of applications Presentation + Interview at TISS Campus Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online through the link provided on the official TISS website (www.tiss.ac.in).
Fill the online application form carefully.
Take a printout of the acknowledgement for future reference. Last Date: 16 July 2026
important_instructions: Positions are on contract basis initially for one year. No TA/DA will be paid for appearing in the interview. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. Selected candidates must join within 15 days and be stationed at Guwahati.

content_sections.heading: TISS Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Download TISS Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: TISS Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: TISS is recruiting 2 Assistant Professors on a contractual basis.

rows.tata_institute_of_social_sciences_tiss_g: Entry Pay Rs. 57,700/- in Academic Pay Level 10 (7th CPC)

content_sections.heading: Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: 1. Centre for Undergraduate Studies (1 Post) – Specialization in Psychology 2. Centre for Peace and Conflict Studies, School of Social Sciences and Humanities (1 Post) – Specialization in Sociology / Political Science / Economics / History

content_sections.heading: TISS Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Educational Qualification (Common for both posts): A. Master’s Degree with 55% marks in relevant subject + NET/SLET/SET OR Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations. OR B. Ph.D. from top 500 ranked foreign university. Desirable Qualifications: Ph.D. in relevant field + teaching experience Research on Northeast India Good publication record Ability to teach interdisciplinary courses

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Shortlisting of applications Presentation + Interview at TISS Campus Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for TISS Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates must apply online through the link provided on the official TISS website ( www.tiss.ac.in ). Fill the online application form carefully. Pay the application fee online. Upload all required documents. Take a printout of the acknowledgement for future reference. Last Date: 16 July 2026

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for TISS Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Positions are on contract basis initially for one year. No TA/DA will be paid for appearing in the interview. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. Selected candidates must join within 15 days and be stationed at Guwahati.

content_sections.heading: TISS Assistant Professor Important Links
content_sections.text: Official Notification PDF: Click here Official Website: Click here Join Arattai Channel: Click Here Join Telegram Channel: Click Here Join WhatsApp Channel: Click Here Sarkari Result: Click Here Download Mobile App: Click Here

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for TISS Assistant Professor 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for online application is 16 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many Assistant Professor posts are vacant at TISS ?
faq.answer: There are 2 posts – one in Centre for Undergraduate Studies (Psychology) and one in Centre for Peace and Conflict Studies.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Assistant Professor at TISS ?
faq.answer: Entry pay of Rs. 57,700/- in Academic Pay Level 10 as per 7th CPC.

faq.question: Q4. What is the essential qualification for TISS Assistant Professor?
faq.answer: Master’s Degree with 55% marks + NET/Ph.D. as per UGC norms (or equivalent foreign Ph.D.).

faq.question: Q5. Is NET mandatory for TISS Assistant Professor recruitment?
faq.answer: NET/SLET/SET is required unless the candidate holds a Ph.D. as per UGC 2009/2016 regulations.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for TISS faculty positions?
faq.answer: Apply online only through the official TISS website www.tiss.ac.in before 16 July 2026.

faq.question: Q7. What is the duration of the contract for TISS Assistant Professor?
faq.answer: Initially 1 year, extendable based on performance and institute requirements.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for TISS recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, Rs. 1000/- (General), Rs. 250/- (SC/ST/PwD), Women candidates are exempted.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the interview be conducted for TISS posts?
faq.answer: The presentation and interview will be held at TISS Campus.

faq.question: Q10. Is prior teaching experience required for TISS Assistant Professor?
faq.answer: Preference will be given to candidates with Ph.D. and two or more years of teaching experience.
